evidence.description: Lines 90-98: EmptyNoteDiscarded converted to SaveError in Err channel, violating REQ-003 and REQ-017
Lines 18-22: PrepareSaveRequestDeps deviates from canonical PrepareSaveRequest type which specifies CaptureDeps
Lines 160-205: EmptyNoteDiscarded path tested for idle trigger, blur trigger, event emission, and no-SaveNoteRequested
Lines 83-136: Tag delta edge cases covered including null previousFrontmatter with and without tags
Lines 60-167: Pipeline orchestration correctly sequences Steps 1-4, handles errors, emits events in correct order
Lines 28-78: Validation logic correctly handles empty-idle, empty-blur, invariant violation, and happy path
Lines 15-18: Pure function producing correct Obsidian format
Lines 28-43: Correctly delegates to refreshSort and applyTagDelta, conditionally emits TagInventoryUpdated
Lines 187-194: mapFsErrorToReason correctly maps all 5 FsError variants per REQ-010
dispatch-save-request.ts confirmed deleted (Sprint 3 FIND-001 resolved). No dead code files remain.
Lines 1-19: Timestamp opaque type access centralized in single module (Sprint 3 FIND-007 resolved)
Lines 39-51: PipelineInfra separates infrastructure concerns from domain CaptureDeps. Lines 57-59: makeCaptureAutoSavePipeline accepts CaptureDeps correctly (Sprint 3 FIND-003 resolved)
Lines 14-17: TagInventoryUpdated defined as local type with typed emitInternal callback (Sprint 3 FIND-004 resolved)
Line 12: fast-check imported but unused. PROP-001 and PROP-002 (both required:true Tier 1) implemented as example-based tests, not property-based tests as specified

convergenceSignals.sprintOverSprintProgress: Sprint 3 had 7 findings (6 major, 1 minor). Sprint 4 has 5 findings (1 critical, 2 major, 2 minor). All 6 Sprint 3 findings verified as resolved. Two new spec-fidelity issues identified (EmptyNoteDiscarded Err-channel encoding, PrepareSaveRequest deps deviation). One verification-readiness issue (property tests missing).
